overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a futuristic waterfront promenade in a cyberpunk city during golden hour. The scene features atmospheric haze, neon-lit commercial buildings, industrial structures with water towers, and moderate pedestrian traffic. The camera moves steadily forward along the water, passing under a large overpass bridge at the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with river and bridge views

calm waterway running parallel to the walkway
futuristic high-rise buildings visible through the haze
transparent barrier separating walkway from the water

vertical digital advertisement showing a figure in purple lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a hazy waterfront promenade with views of distant bridge towers and a futuristic city skyline. The camera walks forward along the concrete path, passing a glass safety railing on the right. A large commercial building with prominent purple neon billboards comes into view on the left as the camera approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with industrial water tower and neon signage

events.description: passing the commercial building with large neon billboards, entering industrial district with water tower
sun glare intensifies significantly as the camera turns to face the setting sun

agents.ego_description: walking past the neon-lit commercial building while navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic green car driving along the adjacent road

entered.detail: rusted industrial building with large cylindrical water tank on roof
curved elevated roadway structure winding between buildings
concrete wall with painted text and street art

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the commercial building with neon advertisements and enters a zone with industrial architecture featuring a prominent water tower. The sun glare intensifies as the path curves toward the sunset. Pedestrians walk in both directions along the promenade, and vehicles drive on the adjacent road next to a graffiti-covered wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade facing sunset with retaining walls

events.description: direct sun glare creates strong silhouettes of pedestrians and structures ahead
approaching the large overpass bridge structure that crosses the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking directly toward the bright sunset, navigating through pedestrians silhouetted against the light

notable_agents.action: person walking toward camera, silhouetted against the bright sunlight

entered.detail: large digital screen displaying blue and red graphics on the retaining wall
large concrete bridge structure spanning across the walkway ahead
tall wall with graffiti separating the walkway from the elevated road

segments.scene_description: Walking directly into the setting sun, the scene is dominated by warm golden light and long shadows. The camera approaches a large overpass bridge while passing a concrete retaining wall featuring digital billboards and graffiti. Pedestrians appear as silhouettes against the bright background, and vehicles continue to move along the road to the right.

events.description: entering the shadowed area beneath the overpass bridge structure
exiting the overpass back into the golden hour sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered underpass section, emerging back into sunlight

entered.detail: concrete underside of the bridge creating a roof over the walkway
thick concrete columns supporting the bridge structure

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the shadowed area beneath the large overpass bridge, where the lighting drops significantly. The concrete ceiling and support columns dominate the view overhead. After passing through the covered section, the camera emerges back into the golden sunlight, with the open waterfront visible ahead and debris scattered along the walkway edges.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a hazy waterfront promenade that transitions from a neon-lit cityscape into the blinding glare of a sunset before passing under a massive concrete overpass. It begins on a concrete path beside a glass railing, moving toward a futuristic skyline as a commercial building with purple neon billboards emerges on the left. As the camera passes the advertisements, the environment shifts toward industrial architecture featuring a prominent water tower, while the path curves to intensify the sun glare against a backdrop of pedestrians and graffiti-covered walls. The scene then opens into a wash of warm golden light and long shadows, turning pedestrians into silhouettes as the camera approaches a large overpass bridge lined with digital billboards. Finally, the camera glides into the deep shadows beneath the bridge's concrete ceiling and support columns before emerging once more into the sunlight to reveal the open waterfront and scattered debris along the walkway.
